message:
test(fuzz): add DAG and bipartite fuzz targets

Extend the libFuzzer harness set in fuzz/fuzz_targets/ with two new
structure-aware targets and register them as [[bin]] entries in
fuzz/Cargo.toml so cargo-fuzz can build them alongside the existing
suite.

- fuzz_dag.rs (151 LOC) — exercises DAG algorithms via the arbitrary
  crate: topological_sort, ancestors/descendants, longest_path,
  transitive_closure, and transitive_reduction. Covers both the happy
  path and non-DAG inputs where topological_sort must return Err.

- fuzz_bipartite.rs (119 LOC) — drives the bipartite detection and
  colouring surface (fnx_algorithms::is_bipartite, bipartite_color),
  splitting inputs into arbitrary graphs (where color may legitimately
  error on non-bipartite structures) and known-bipartite graphs built
  from two node sets (where colouring must succeed).

Cargo.lock refreshes come along for the ride: fnx-generators gains a
rand_core dep and hashbrown/indexmap rev to 0.17.0 / 2.14.0
respectively, picked up while cargo resolved deps for the new bins.

files.patch:
@@ -140,6 +140,7 @@ dependencies = [
  "fnx-runtime",
  "mt19937",
  "mwmatching",
+ "rand_core",
  "serde",
 ]
 
@@ -291,9 +292,9 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "hashbrown"
-version = "0.16.1"
+version = "0.17.0"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "841d1cc9bed7f9236f321df977030373f4a4163ae1a7dbfe1a51a2c1a51d9100"
+checksum = "4f467dd6dccf739c208452f8014c75c18bb8301b050ad1cfb27153803edb0f51"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "heck"
@@ -315,12 +316,12 @@ checksum = "3d3067d79b975e8844ca9eb072e16b31c3c1c36928edf9c6789548c524d0d954"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "indexmap"
-version = "2.13.1"
+version = "2.14.0"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "45a8a2b9cb3e0b0c1803dbb0758ffac5de2f425b23c28f518faabd9d805342ff"
+checksum = "d466e9454f08e4a911e14806c24e16fba1b4c121d1ea474396f396069cf949d9"
 dependencies = [
  "equivalent",
- "hashbrown 0.16.1",
+ "hashbrown 0.17.0",
  "serde",
  "serde_core",
 ]

@@ -94,3 +94,13 @@ doc = false
 name = "fuzz_pajek"
 path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_pajek.rs"
 doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_dag"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_dag.rs"
+doc = false
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fuzz_bipartite"
+path = "fuzz_targets/fuzz_bipartite.rs"
+doc = false
